violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the three bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS must be maintained clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
The grout through out the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The kitchen floor is in poor repair. The floor has areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
